name: Content: Web Funnel Tags
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have\u00a0added line items\u00a0to your funnel tracking script (see\u00a0"}, {"text": "Web Funnel Tracking", "bold": true}, {"text": "), then you can reference them within your email content using the web funnel tags."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following is a screenshot of the WYSIWYG content editor with Web Funnel Tags "dateInserted": "2025-11-28T12:58:22+00:00", "insertUserID": 2012, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "2012", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The general syntax of a web funnel tag is:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "{{website.website_tag.funnel_tag.funnel_name\u00a0or\u00a0line_items}}", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Where,"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "\""}, {"text": "Website tag", "bold": true}, {"text": "\"\u00a0refers to the name assigned to the website tag when\u00a0creating the website tracking script."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "\""}, {"text": "Funnel tag", "bold": true}, {"text": "\"\u00a0refers to the name assigned to the funnel tag when defining the\u00a0name of the web funnel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "\""}, {"text": "funnel_name", "bold": true}, {"text": "\"\u00a0is an attribute that references the name of the web funnel"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "\""}, {"text": "line_items", "bold": true}, {"text": "\"\u00a0is an attribute that references the array of items that you passed to the\u00a0web funnel line items array. "}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The \""}, {"text": "line_items", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" array contains these four elements:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Description", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0\u2013 A short description of the product"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "page_url", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0\u2013 The URL to the product page. If using funnel tracking for a membership form, provide the URL of the page where the contact last left off"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "image_url", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0\u2013 The URL of the product image"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "HTML", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0\u2013 Any additional HTML coding that will appear in the personalization."}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use Liquid scripting to access the elements of the line_items array and iterate through each set of elements."}]}]
